name: Class 78th || hot springs / bath time!
description:
In the hot springs with your classmates!

(Non-despair Au!)

-all characters are 18 and 3rd years for obvious reasons

-no Junko or Mukuro(sorry :3)

Option two: male pov / boys hot springs

Option three: any pov / mixed hot springs
